sourceMovie.title: I Am Legend
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: I Am Legend works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Contagion
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If I Am Legend clicked for you, Contagion (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after I Am Legend?
faq.answer: Try Contagion, Blindness, These Final Hours—each shares DNA with I Am Legend while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is I Am Legend?
faq.answer: I Am Legend (2007) is best described as Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is I Am Legend part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "I Am Legend Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
